name: Client Operating Model Phase 11 Build Operator Surfaces
outcome_goal: Implement operator inspection surfaces and bounded workflow-builder read models across census, Object Truth, source authority, simulation, verifiers, drift, cartridge status, and next safe actions.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not introduce freeform workflow programming.
Do not mutate state from inspection surfaces except bounded safe actions that call existing command authority.
Do not duplicate upstream authority in UI-only state.
Do not hide stale or partial data.

jobs.label: phase_11_operator_surfaces_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 11 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_11_operator_surfaces/PLAN.md after prior wave outputs are present. Implement bounded read-oriented operator surfaces/read models for system census, Object Truth inspection, identity/source authority, simulation timeline, verifier results, sandbox drift, cartridge status, and next safe actions. Expose API/MCP/CLI metadata through existing gateway/tool patterns. Keep actions suggested and bounded; no freeform workflow programming and no UI-only authority. Regenerate shared docs if surface metadata changed, then add tests for empty states, stale data, permission/partial data states where patterns exist, conflict states, and safe-action blockers. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_11_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and final integration notes. Do not stage or commit.
